title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: Given the sampled control system as shown in the figure, the open-loop pulse transfer function is \( G_0(z) = \frac{5\left(1 - \mathrm{e}^{-2 T}\right) z}{(z - 1)\left(z - \mathrm{e}^{-2 T}\right)} \). When the sampling interval is \( T = 1 \) second, is the system stable or unstable?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text:
Consider the following Amplitude Modulated (AM) signal, where \( f_m < B \):

\[
X_{AM}(t) = 10 \left(1 + 0.5 \sin 2 \pi f_m t\right) \cos 2 \pi f_c t
\]

The AM signal gets added to noise with Power Spectral Density \( S_n(f) \) given in the figure. What is the ratio of average sideband power to mean noise power?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: Let \( H(z) \) be the z-transform of a real-valued discrete-time signal \( h[n] \). If \( P(z)=H(z)H\left(\frac{1}{z}\right) \) has a zero at \( z=\frac{1}{2}+\frac{1}{2}j \) and has a total of four zeros, what are all four zeros of \( P(z) \)?
